filter: Contacts with Number of plants known, created YTD

calls.note: Answered = Connected | Meeting scheduled | Left live message

summary_notes: Contacts with a phone number are 1.5x more likely to reply to a sales email (19.9% vs 13.2%) than those without.
Zero contacts without a phone number received an answered call (as expected - you cannot call someone you do not have a number for).
Overall YTD call answer rate across 1,597 attempts was 19.1%, reaching 158 unique contacts (12.2% of phone-having cohort).
Segment size: 71.5% of YTD contacts have a phone; 28.5% do not.
